title: Auto Repair Quote Consistency Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to assess consistency of auto repair quotes against industry benchmarks (ISO, Lean, Six Sigma principles).

inputs.label: Labor Rate per Hour
inputs.businessContext: Standard hourly labor charge from the repair shop.

label_i18n.es: Tarifa de mano de obra por hora

businessContext_i18n.en: Standard hourly labor charge from the repair shop.
businessContext_i18n.de: Standardmäßiger Arbeitslohn der Werkstatt pro Stunde.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taux horaire standard facturé par l'atelier de réparation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo estándar por hora de mano de obra del taller de reparación.
businessContext_i18n.ar: سعر الساعة القياسي للعمالة من ورشة الإصلاح.

inputs.label: Estimated Labor Hours
inputs.businessContext: Total labor hours quoted for the repair job.

label_i18n.es: Horas de mano de obra estimadas

businessContext_i18n.en: Total labor hours quoted for the repair job.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Onarım işi için teklif edilen toplam işçilik saati.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamte Arbeitsstunden, die für den Reparaturauftrag veranschlagt wurden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Total des heures de main-d'œuvre citées pour le travail de réparation.
businessContext_i18n.es: Total de horas de mano de obra cotizadas para el trabajo de reparación.

inputs.label: Parts Cost
inputs.businessContext: Total cost of replacement parts as quoted.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cost of replacement parts as quoted.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Teklif edilen yedek parçaların toplam maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Coût total des pièces de rechange tel que cité.
businessContext_i18n.es: Costo total de las piezas de repuesto según lo cotizado.
businessContext_i18n.ar: التكلفة الإجمالية لقطع الغيار المستبدلة كما هو مذكور.

businessContext_i18n.tr: Sarf malzemeleri (ör. sıvılar, bezler) için ücret.
businessContext_i18n.de: Gebühr für verschiedene Verbrauchsmaterialien (z. B. Flüssigkeiten, Lappen).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Frais de fournitures diverses (ex. fluides, chiffons).
businessContext_i18n.es: Cargo por suministros varios (p. ej., fluidos, trapos).

inputs.label: Sales Tax Rate
inputs.businessContext: Applicable sales tax percentage on parts and supplies.

label_i18n.es: Tasa de impuesto a las ventas

businessContext_i18n.en: Applicable sales tax percentage on parts and supplies.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Parça ve sarf malzemelerinde geçerli satış vergisi yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anwendbarer Umsatzsteuersatz auf Teile und Verbrauchsmaterialien.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de taxe de vente applicable sur les pièces et fournitures.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de impuesto a las ventas aplicable a piezas y suministros.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نسبة ضريبة المبيعات المطبقة على قطع الغيار والمستلزمات.

inputs.label: Shop Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of repair shop influences benchmark labor rates.

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of repair shop influences benchmark labor rates.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamir atölyesi türü, referans işçilik ücretlerini etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Art der Reparaturwerkstatt beeinflusst die Richtwerte für Arbeitsstunden.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le type d'atelier de réparation influence les taux de main-d'œuvre de référence.
businessContext_i18n.es: El tipo de taller de reparación influye en las tarifas de mano de obra de referencia.
businessContext_i18n.ar: نوع ورشة الإصلاح يؤثر على معدلات العمالة المرجعية.

inputs.label: Repair Category
inputs.businessContext: Category of repair affects typical labor hours and parts markup.

businessContext_i18n.en: Category of repair affects typical labor hours and parts markup.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tamir kategorisi, tipik işçilik saatlerini ve parça kâr marjını etkiler.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Reparaturkategorie beeinflusst die typischen Arbeitsstunden und den Teileaufschlag.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La catégorie de réparation affecte les heures de main-d'œuvre typiques et la majoration des pièces.
businessContext_i18n.es: La categoría de reparación afecta las horas de mano de obra típicas y el margen de piezas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: فئة الإصلاح تؤثر على ساعات العمل النموذجية وهامش ربح قطع الغيار.

inputs.label: Use Original Equipment Manufacturer (OEM) Parts
inputs.businessContext: OEM parts are typically more expensive than aftermarket.

label_i18n.es: Usar piezas del fabricante de equipo original (OEM)
label_i18n.ar: استخدام قطع الغيار الأصلية من الشركة المصنعة

businessContext_i18n.en: OEM parts are typically more expensive than aftermarket.
businessContext_i18n.tr: OEM parçaları genellikle yedek parçalardan daha pahalıdır.
businessContext_i18n.de: OEM-Teile sind in der Regel teurer als Ersatzteile.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Les pièces OEM sont généralement plus chères que les pièces de rechange.
businessContext_i18n.es: Las piezas OEM suelen ser más caras que las del mercado de accesorios.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قطع الغيار الأصلية عادة ما تكون أغلى من قطع الغيار البديلة.

rules.message: Labor rate must be between 50 and 250 USD/hour.
Labor hours must be between 0.5 and 40.
Parts cost must be between 0 and 10,000 USD.
Shop supplies fee must be between 0 and 500 USD.
Tax rate must be between 0% and 15%.
OEM parts cost seems too low; verify parts cost.

thresholds.message: Total quote exceeds $5,000. Consider obtaining a second opinion.
Labor hours exceed 10. Verify scope of work.
Parts cost exceeds $3,000. Check for alternative parts.
Quote consistency score is low. Review itemized details.

hiddenLossDrivers: Scrap and rework not in unit price
suggestedActions: Reconcile unit cost with last PO
